title: Public correction/appeals path + triage workflow
context: A public correction/appeals path lets clinicians, advocates, and families report errors in structured criteria, which are triaged within the freshness SLA and versioned. This is a safety mechanism: any potential harm event triggers incident review and correction. It depends on the scaled dataset being live.
objective: Build a public correction/appeals intake and triage workflow so errors can be reported, triaged within SLA, and versioned.
acceptanceCriteria: A public correction/appeals path lets clinicians/advocates/families report errors in structured criteria.
A triage workflow resolves reports within the freshness SLA; corrections are versioned.
Any potential harm event triggers an incident-review entry (O8).
No PII or secrets are exposed by the intake; submissions are handled per the privacy stance.
